calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Britta Peterson, former attorney for executor Mabel Streets (via Zoom).
No other appearances.

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

The Court noted that the estate was insolvent and that the estate real property had been sold by foreclosure, resulting in no surplus funds available for payment of creditor claims or expenses of administration. The Court further noted that the executor was the sole beneficiary of the estate.

Ms. Peterson indicated no objection to administrative closure of the case and advised that closure would be the most efficient use of court resources.

The Court ordered the status hearing taken off calendar and directed that the case be administratively closed, without discharging the executor or releasing the surety.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear (Re: Executor Mable Brooks
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Continued To Jan-12-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mabel Streets, executor in pro per (via Zoom).
Britta Peterson, former attorney for Mabel Streets (via Zoom).
Scott Jordan, claimant (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on 1) Status on Close of Estate; and 2) Order to Appear issued to Mabel Streets.

The Court took the order to appear off calendar upon Ms. Streets' appearance.

Ms. Streets reported that the estate's sole asset, a residence subject to a reverse mortgage, had been foreclosed and sold at auction after failed sale efforts that required vacancy. She stated the debt exceeded the property's value and left no remaining assets.

Discussion was held regarding Ms. Streets' attorney, Roger Wintle, who had passed away. Ms. Peterson stated she had reached out to Mr. Wintle's son, Ben Wintle, who appeared to be a partner attorney based on information found online, but was never responded to. Ms. Peterson also indicated her modest creditor claim may be withdrawn given the circumstances.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to January 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court suggested that Ms. Streets file a verified declaration under penalty of perjury explaining the foreclosure and lack of assets, a brief accounting, and to serve Ms. Peterson and Mr. Jordan. Ms. Streets was also encouraged to contact Ben Wintle regarding assistance in closing the estate.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Continued To Oct-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Britta Peterson, former attorney for executor Mable Streets (via Zoom).

The matter came on calendar for status on close of estate.

The Court noted that executor Mabel Street's successor counsel, Mr. Wintle, passed away in January, and there has been uncertainty regarding the status of the estate.

Ms. Peterson stated she has had no communication from Ms. Street or any new counsel, and cannot provide information regarding the estate's current status.

The Court continued the matter to October 22, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and indicated that it would issue an Order to Appear to the executor Mabel Streets to appear on that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Continued To Aug-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Orders: 1) Quiet Title Confirming Ownership Of Real Property; 2) Double Damages; And 3) Attorney Fees And Legal Costs
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Off Calendar

Verified Petition For Orders: 1) Quiet Title Confirming Ownership Of Real Property; 2) Double Damages; And 3) Attorney Fees And Legal Costs
Off Calendar Jul-29-2024 Continued To Dec-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Britta Peterson appeared by zoom for Mable Streets (executor/objector).
Scott Jordan appeared by zoom for John Jenkins (petitioner).

Mrs. Peterson stated that she waives defective notice. Mr. Jordan stated that the record needs to be developed and that he is hoping to go to mediation. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 25, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 4, 2024. The Petition for Orders: 1) Quiet Title Confirming Ownership of Real Property; 2) Double Damages, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on December 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The parties are to obtain a copy of the order from the court's website.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Britta Peterson appeared in person for and with Mable Streets by zoom.

Discussion was held regarding which one of the three dates (10/18/23, 10/27/23 and 11/01/23) should be considered as the date of execution of the will. Mrs. Peterson stated that the only maternal relative is Yvonne Lewis and that no one knows anything about the paternal side of the family. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 18, 2023 and the codicil dated October 18, 2023 are admitted to probate. Mable Streets is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 23, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is to be filed two weeks prior to the hearing. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
